title: Make column header cell height adjustable with wrap text
excerpt: The column headers are limited to a single row in height, but sometimes the text describing the column header is long enough that the column width is way too wide unless you drag the width down and effectively hide the d…

posts.author: estraily (Eri)
posts.cookedHtml: The column headers are limited to a single row in height, but sometimes the text describing the column header is long enough that the column width is way too wide unless you drag the width down and effectively hide the description in the header. It would be nice to have a height drag option for the column header so you can wrap the column header text. Best of both worlds. Thank you.

posts.author: DelBocaVista (Marty Fishdog)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to increase the height of the column headers yet? This would be a nice feature.

posts.author: sburdo (sburdo)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I agree. To make the headers visible they have to be too wide and drags the whole board out.

posts.author: PM_Karen (Karen H)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree! Monday, would love the header to wrap and increase height! right now a lot of my info is cut off, and adds difficulty for viewing.

posts.author: simood (Simon O'Donnell)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be great! Save on lots of horizontal scrolling.

posts.author: mariellep (Marielle)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. I have many instances that the name is quite long. Also, it would be great if you can bundle certain column together under a big column name (a.k.a. Instagram (and then columns for posts, stories, interactions etc). That would also help decrease the column names
